name: A Crypt
description:
You are in a place iluminated by a red magic light,
there is a glass table with a black coffin in front
of you and it emits the red light, behind the coffin you can see 
a Holy book protected by a silver grate.

extra_descriptions.description:
You look at the Holy book and read the words..
BE CAREFUL with Locky, he is the Personification of the EVIL!!
